name: GOLFTEC Blue Ash
address: 11126 Kenwood Rd Suite B, Blue Ash, OH 45242
about: GOLFTEC Blue Ash is a golf training and club fitting center focused on data-driven improvement. The facility utilizes advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion measurement, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback. Lessons are tailored to individual goals with certified PGA instructors, while club fittings use technology to optimize equipment, offering an average of 21 additional yards off the tee. The center provides a structured learning environment for golfers of all skill levels seeking to improve their mechanics and consistency.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using OPTIMOTION and high-speed video
Personalized improvement plans from certified PGA instructors
Technology-enabled club fitting for optimized equipment performance
Structured practice environment with launch monitors and feedback

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides equipment for lessons and fittings. For club fittings, you'll be using various club heads and shafts to find the optimal setup for your swing.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks to the facility?
faq.answer: The facility does not mention a full kitchen or bar service, but specific BYOB policies are not detailed. It's recommended to check with the center directly regarding outside food and drink.

faq.question: How long does it take to play a full 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content doesn't specify timeframes for simulator rounds, but typically golf simulator sessions allow for flexible play lengths depending on the format and group size.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly for junior golfers?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC caters to juniors with technology-driven instruction that simplifies complex swing concepts, making it accessible for young golfers to learn and improve.
